"},

pehz wufu / fo Jojakims bij
"},
    {"n": 3, "column": "left", "text": "Jo tas notikke ta KUNga

"},

fawu Karra-Spehkn prett Jeru-
"},
    {"n": 5, "column": "right", "text": "Tä tappe tas Pilſſahts

tam Gaddain ta Kehnina Zede-
"},
    {"n": 6, "column": "right", "text": "Zettora Mehnesi/ dewitâ

"},
    {"n": 7, "column": "right", "text": "Zad tappe tai Pilſfahta

sa bija. Bet tee Kaldeeri bija
apkahrt to Pilſfahtu.
"},
    {"n": 8, "column": "right", "text": "Un tee gahje pahr to Klai-

aam pakat/ un panahze Zede-
"},

les uhs Riblatu/ eekſch Eemata

"},
